title: Task
description: Defines the structure of a task passed between orchestrator and agents.

taskId.description: Unique task identifier. Format: <phase>-<sequence> e.g. phase-01-001

agent.description: Agent responsible for executing this task.

skill.description: Skill name to invoke, if applicable. Must match a skill in .gemini/skills/.

mode.description: Optional execution mode hint passed to the agent or skill.

blockedBy.description: List of taskIds that must complete before this task can start.

dependencies.description: Ordered list of taskIds whose outputs are required as input.

fileOwnership.description: Glob patterns for files this agent exclusively owns during execution.

input.description: Input payload for the agent or skill.

context.description: Supporting context: prior outputs, relevant file paths, references.

constraints.description: Additional constraints specific to this task invocation.

output.description: Populated by the agent on completion. Must conform to report-schema.

metadata.description: Operational metadata: timestamps, retry counts, session info.
